text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship: The Ultimate Unsinkable Battleship
(Epilogue)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... Fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The waves crash rhythmically on the beach
beneath a reddening sky...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I look to my side, feeling relaxed and content.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series is over! Congrats to all! Now,
time to let loose and wreak havoc on the marine
ecosystem!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship makes a beeline for the water with a
net at the ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mentally retrace my steps, while listening to the
sound of the waves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship performed extremely well in the
Twinkle Series, and we made it through our first
three-year period together in one piece.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I went to find her to congratulate her and was met
with a scene of chaos.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Loot! Where's the loot?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey there, ATM―I mean, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, listen up. The adventurer blood in my
veins awoke from its secret hibernation without
warning!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If I don't get my hands on some loot soon, every
living thing'll start looking like an ATM to me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Right?! That's why I have to embark on my
journey, now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're coming too, right?! Hurry and get your
stuff! We leave in sixty seconds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I set off on an adventure with Gold Ship...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Check out that fish! I've never seen coloration
like that before. It might be an undiscovered
species! Quick, grab it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That's one weird-looking stag beetle! It'll
be worth a fortune if it's a rare one! Careful with it
now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Dang, that hermit crab's massive! I bet it's a mutant, for sure! Don't let it get away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not entirely sure how much time passes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But the next thing I know, we're on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We've been to tons of beaches together, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We were born of the sea and, in the end, it is our
destiny to return to it...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Though, I don't have a clue why we're here now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I belatedly remember why I was looking for her in
the first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still something important I have to tell
her.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Where'd that come from? What are you, Sudden
Salutations Sam?
choice_data_list:
I wanted to congratulate you because you've
worked so hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first three years are a key time for
Umamusume at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship not only made it through all three
years, she even made a name for herself in the
process.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, for realsies? That must mean I'm really
awesome, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw, c'mon. You can do better than that. Use your
diaphragm.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I'm saying...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You gotta say it like you mean it! C'mon, get in
that celebratory mood and get hyped!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna praise me, yell it loud enough to
hurt the moon's ears! CONGRATS! Like that!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
CONGRATS, CONGRATS, CONGRATS! Aw yeah!
Time to terrorize the fish population!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next thing I know, Gold Ship is sprinting for the
water, yelling about catching a sea bream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yes! I got one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brings her fresh catch ashore, and we eat it
together.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Phew, I'm stuffed. That sea bream was tasty.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Right? It was delicious in both fresh sashimi form
and grilled skewer form.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...You know what, Trainer? Nothing fazes you
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Back when we first met, you would totally freak
out over getting thrown into a burlap sack and
carried off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because of the sheer number of wild
adventures Gold Ship has dragged me on, but I've
learned how to just go with the flow.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You should give yourself a pat on the back. It's
not just anyone that can jive with my biorhythm.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Anyway, phew! This night sure is something, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... Fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Think the sea fireflies will be out soon?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... Fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if I can find any constellations in the
sky...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's just how tired I am, but the sound of
the waves is so soothing. My eyelids grow heavier
and heavier...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Trainer? You alive? Hellooo?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Welp... Out cold, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What better way to show my affection than
to write "gold" on your forehead? All righty...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You might not realize it, but the fact that you can
keep up with me makes you a beast in your own
right.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Done! My handwriting isn't half bad, if I do say so!
Bahaha! Now that's awesome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up at the academy some time later with
Gold Ship laughing in my face.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bahaha! This is priceless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't find out it was because I have the word
"gold" emblazoned on my forehead until much,
much later.
